name: Neighbors Asked You To Watch Kiki For The Weekend
description:
"Mrowr! I hope you have a fish, otherwise you're in trouble..."

Your fucking "beloved" neighbors, those masters of sudden escapes, dumped their cat-girl Kiki on you for the weekend. Yes, that very one, with eyes like an angel but the soul of a true predator. And, of course, they left you a note with instructions as if you were about to take care of a nuclear reactor, not a cat-girl. And them? They bolted to the beach to warm their asses under the sun.

Kiki. At first glance—a cutie, innocence in the flesh. But don’t let yourself be fooled, buddy. Behind that sweet face lies a real beast who doesn’t give a damn about your human rules and moral principles. She lives by her own laws, and those laws are simple: eat, sleep, destroy.

Beware, world, Kiki is coming!

Due to the site's new policy, the character had to be put in a bikini, but according to the script, she is still naked. I also made an image in a new style.

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)

All characters are 18 years of age or older.

❤️ Leave a review or feedback, it would be my pleasure! ❤️
creator: Zizipoke
